Name: Agas & Tamar
Description: Since 1998, a Tel Aviv jewelry institution.

Name: Alef Alef
Description: Contemporary womenswear with a focus on quality, considered design, and the enduring appeal of the everyday.

Name: Alembika
Address: 87 Ibn Gvirol St, Tel Aviv (+4 more)
Description: Founded in 2005 by designer Hagar Alembik (Shenkar) and anthropologist Dr. Judy Padlon. Timeless, size-inclusive womenswear plus an avant-garde line of leather bags, produced in small exclusive runs across 14 Israeli branches and thousands of boutiques worldwide.

Name: All At Once
Address: At En Culture, 19 Lilienblum St, Tel Aviv-Yafo
Description: A Tel Aviv collective founded by Ilay Henriksen and Noam Segev in 2021, driven by family and friendship. Story-led drops and collections overseen end to end, from meticulous cuts to uncompromising quality. Everything, everyone, everywhere.

Name: Aluma
Description: Beautiful colorful handmade knitwear, amazing one of a kind clothing, slow fashion at its most considered.

Name: Anat Friedman
Description: Precise, quietly elegant womenswear. Anat Friedman's designs speak in restraint, each piece a study in deliberate simplicity.

Name: Andro Lomusia
Description: Established in 2021 and rooted in personal struggle and pain, Androlomusia reflects and reacts to the industry, societal norms, and current world events, building something new with no biases attached.

Name: Anjaly
Description: Effortless unisex loungewear and activewear for women and men, from yoga mat to street, comfort without compromise.

Name: Artwear
Description: Wearable art through bold, original prints. Each Artwear piece turns the body into a canvas, vivid, unapologetic design.

Name: Assaf Peleg
Description: Designing for the elegant, multi-faceted woman, garments born from emotion and a deep belief in personal style. Assaf Peleg sees the woman before he sees the fabric.

Name: Assemble
Description: Contemporary streetwear with a tightly considered aesthetic, Assemble designs garments that read clean, modern, and distinctly local.

Name: Atawear
Description: A revival of Israel's iconic ATA textile brand, first founded in 1935. The original 'Made in Israel' spirit, workwear heritage reimagined for contemporary street culture.

Name: Aviva Zilberman
Description: A high-end ready-to-wear house founded 2008.

Name: Ayala Vitkon
Description: Sophisticated handmade jewelry from Ayala Vitkon's studio.

Name: Ayoola
Description: Ayelet's brand, specialising in designing and manufacturing bralettes for women.

Name: BANANHOT
Description: High-quality swimwear with flattering, cheeky cuts and super-creative patterns.

Name: Barbatana
Description: A streetwear label trading in cheeky local humor, Barbatana's tees lean on Hebrew puns, in-jokes, and a distinctly Israeli sense of mischief.

Name: Bazz and Lutra
Description: Handcrafted fashion, jewelry, accessories, and home decor, blending classic tradition with a contemporary edge.

Name: Bein Lebein
Description: A multidisciplinary label built around hand-screenprinted cotton, heavy-weight natural fabrics (200-400gsm), and small-batch local production.

Name: Bewear
Description: A dancewear brand built around the idea that once you're a dancer, you're a dancer forever.

Name: Biliblond
Address: 1 Yordei HaSira St, Tel Aviv Port
Description: Swimwear and beachwear with a playful spirit, designed for the Mediterranean lifestyle.

Name: Blueberry TLV
Description: A fresh Tel Aviv label with a playful, considered approach to everyday womenswear, vibrant, wearable, and distinctly local.

Name: Bow M
Description: A label working in considered, modern silhouettes, quiet pieces with a careful hand.

Name: Bracha Baron
Description: Clean, urban, refined womenswear for a wide range of ages, in dialogue with international trends and balancing comfort with quality.

Name: Bring Wear
Description: Unisex everyday wear with a relaxed, contemporary sensibility, Bring Wear builds pieces meant to travel from morning to night without changing.

Name: Chopshop Corp
Description: Unorganized. Unruly. Unmissable.

Name: Ciporkin by Dalit
Description: Bauhaus Tel Aviv meets Japanese aesthetics. Geometric, architectural cuts in flowing fabrics, asymmetric, monochromatic, textured.

Name: Co.Co
Description: Collective Collection, a collaborative womenswear label where strong individual voices become a unified design statement.

Name: Comme il Faut
Description: Original, artistic womenswear, monochromatic palettes, unexpected textures, and asymmetric construction. Comme il Faut dresses the woman who refuses the obvious.

Name: Con.fail
Description: A label working in a streetwear-meets-conceptual register, playful, slightly off-kilter pieces that break the rules on purpose.

Name: Cor-e
Description: Womenswear in clean, considered silhouettes designed for soft layering and easy wear.

Name: Cottna
Description: Period and everyday underwear in soft cotton, Cottna designs reusable, leak-proof basics built for comfort, sustainability, and real life.

Name: Cotton
Description: Three decades of womenswear built on natural fabrics, local production, and unwavering quality.

Name: Dalit Peer
Description: Womenswear by designer Dalit Peer, soft, considered silhouettes with a quiet, contemporary hand.

Name: Dana Ashkenazy
Address: Ramat Aviv Mall, Tel Aviv (+1 more)
Description: Easy, considered womenswear for the modern everyday, designed with an eye for proportion and a commitment to quiet confidence.

Name: Dodo Bar Or
Description: Tel Aviv's most internationally celebrated bohemian label.

Name: Dorin Frankfurt
Description: One of Israel's most recognised fashion names, Dorin Frankfurt's work blends European sophistication with a distinctly Israeli sensibility.

Name: Dorit Sade
Description: Womenswear with quiet originality, Dorit Sade designs for women who dress with intention and wear their clothes on their own terms.

Name: Doron Ashkenazi
Description: Designer Doron Ashkenazi's eponymous label, considered, refined womenswear with a sharp eye for proportion and finish.

Name: Dostix
Description: Blending modern urban life with practical, dynamic design. The Dostix brand has established international selling points across Europe, Japan, and the USA.

Name: Eladan
Description: Thoughtful everyday pieces made with care and a contemporary hand.

Name: Flo by Ella Braitman
Description: High-quality women's fashion in limited series, with fine European fabrics.

Name: Fly Rooster
Description: Textile artist Ofir Yaakobi rescues retired industrial materials, parachutes, climbing ropes, safety harnesses, sails, and turns them into handmade fashion pieces, each carrying a new story.

Name: Forest
Description: Tel Aviv's green lung of fashion, drawing from forests, oceans, and outdoor culture.

Name: Frau Blau
Description: Tel Aviv label by designer Helena Blaunstein, maximalist womenswear with a strong sense of print, color, and storytelling.

Name: Frett
Description: A designer knitwear studio: timeless design, fine natural fibres, responsible production in limited quantities. Minimalistic, effortless pieces ethically crafted in Europe.

Name: Gala
Description: A womenswear label with a refined, contemporary point of view, considered silhouettes and quietly confident essentials.

Name: Galler
Description: Women's fashion with bold patterns, optimistic prints, and playful asymmetry. Galler brings colour and joy to the fashion scene.

Name: Gartenbanken Shoes
Description: Women's shoes and sandals, considered, wearable, and crafted for the streets of Tel Aviv.

Name: Gelada
Description: An illustration, design, and culture studio making its own tees, prints, and paraphernalia, designed like souvenirs from destinations around the globe and the themes that inspire it.

Name: Gertrud
Description: Classy, comfortable womenswear.

Name: Gon Surfing
Description: Tel Aviv surf culture meets street fashion. Oversized silhouettes for women and men who live between the ocean and the city.

Name: Gottex
Address: 62 Anilevich St, Yad Eliyahu, Tel Aviv (+3 more)
Description: Israel's most iconic swimwear house since 1956 - Gottex dressed Hollywood and royalty long before the country had a fashion industry.

Name: Hadas Mor
Description: Thoughtful breathing lingerie brand based in Pardes Hanna.

Name: Hagar Satat
Description: Hagar Satat — considered, sculptural womenswear with a refined, modern hand.

Name: Hagit Tassa
Description: Contemporary womenswear focused on denim and versatile day-to-night dressing, clean lines, confident construction.

Name: Hagomels
Description: Independent label, small-batch, considered pieces with a quiet, modern hand.

Name: Haia
Description: Contemporary womenswear with a considered, creative approach.

Name: Haptic Path
Description: A studio working at the intersection of craft, material, and form - tactile, considered objects.

Name: Heroic
Description: Womenswear built around the perfect pair of pants - comfortable, flattering fits that carry you from morning to night without compromise.

Name: Hila Feinberg
Description: Minimalist, oversize womenswear for those who dress with intention. Hila Feinberg creates space for the woman inside the garment.

Name: Hila Shemesh
Description: Womenswear with a careful, artisan-led approach, each piece considered, each season deliberate. Hila Shemesh designs for the woman who values craft over noise.

Name: Holyland Civilians
Description: Edgy Mediterranean streetwear and activewear with a clubwear edge, designed for all genders, for the track, the rave, and everywhere between.

Name: Hosh Studio
Description: Children's clothing studio by Noy Shapira - vintage-inspired, shaped by everyday life as a mother. Bold color, ease, and a non-gendered approach.

Name: House of Jaffa
Description: House of Jaffa, considered fashion with a refined, design-led point of view, rooted in the spirit of its namesake city.

Name: House of Shine
Description: House of Shine, occasion-wear with shimmer, sequins, and statement silhouettes for the nights you want to be seen.

Name: IDEE
Description: Rooted in idea, IDEE creates womenswear that lives in the space between structure and ease, with a clean, modern sensibility.

Name: Inhale Exhale
Description: Israel's first yoga muslin blanket, soft, natural, breathable.

Name: Jessa Grey
Description: Size-inclusive basics, oversized, comfortable, and endlessly versatile.

Name: Jetski Fashion
Description: Born from a deep desire to encourage people to embrace their uniqueness.

Name: Jin-G
Description: Jin-G, a contemporary label working in a relaxed streetwear register with a considered, design-forward eye.

Name: Jollori
Description: Independent studio, playful, considered pieces with an artistic sensibility.

Name: JOR-D
Description: Every garment is a canvas, every design a message.

Name: Jul Fashion
Description: Independent womenswear, modern, wearable pieces designed for layering and long use.

Name: Justine Hats
Description: Millinery, handcrafted hats for every occasion and every mood.

Name: Kaisra Design
Description: Born from the search for a precise balance - garments that feel like a second skin, wrapping and exact, letting you project presence effortlessly.

Name: Karen Mizrahi
Description: Womenswear for day and night, elegant, wearable, and considered. Karen Mizrahi designs with confidence and a deep understanding of the modern woman's wardrobe.

Name: Karen Shavit
Description: Fun, colourful, and size-inclusive womenswear with a joyful, optimistic spirit. Karen Shavit designs for real women who want to be noticed, and to feel good doing it.

Name: Kedem Sasson
Description: Dramatic, sculptural womenswear, Kedem Sasson designs garments that command a room, with architectural precision and an unapologetic sense of theatre.

Name: Keren Wolf
Description: Keren Wolf, an accessories label known for handcrafted bags and shoes with a sculptural, contemporary point of view.

Name: Kianne Frankfurt
Description: Designer Kianne Frankfurt, womenswear with a refined, considered hand and a focus on craft and material.

Name: Kid A
Description: Size-inclusive basics and bold prints, Kid A is for the woman who believes in comfort as a political act.

Name: Kimka Studio
Description: Kim Dror's studio specialises in indigo-dyed clothing and textiles, informed by traditional Japanese mastery and global indigo cultures.

Name: Kisim
Description: Bags, wallets, purses, and backpacks with a distinctive design sensibility, functional objects made beautiful.

Name: Lara Rosnovsky
Description: Kimono-inspired, colourful, and deeply feminine, Lara Rosnovsky's patterned loungewear and beachwear bring a romantic, painterly quality to the everyday wardrobe.

Name: Layou
Description: Size-inclusive womenswear built on oversize silhouettes, textured fabrics, and considered minimalism, designed for real wardrobes, real women, and the full spectrum of occasions.

Name: Lazyeyeppl
Description: A Tel Aviv label with a distinctive editorial eye, considered, original work that refuses easy categorisation.

Name: Liah by Liat Raziel
Description: Liat Raziel designs from a belief that fashion is both a necessity and self-expression.

Name: Lika Swimwear
Description: Swimwear designed for real bodies and Mediterranean summers - flattering cuts, modern silhouettes.

Name: Luka Chari
Description: Men's basics, born from a search for clothes that feel truly right.

Name: Maayan Paz
Description: Womenswear since 2012, minimalist lines, flattering cuts, and luxurious fabrics.

Name: Macchia Studio
Description: Natural tie-dye, organic fabrics, and ethically produced activewear and loungewear - Macchia Studio blends an earthy, free-spirited aesthetic with a conscious approach to production.

Name: Madam Bubu
Description: Relaxed, achromatic, and body-celebrating - Madam Bubu designs clothes that feel like they already know you.

Name: Made by Har
Description: Independent label by designer Har, small-batch womenswear made with care, with a quiet, contemporary hand.

Name: Magia
Description: Tshirts, prints, creative edgy designed tshirts and more

Name: Maim Jewelry
Description: A jewelry studio of delicate, considered pieces inspired by water and natural form.

Name: Maskit
Description: Founded in 1954 by Ruth Dayan, Maskit is Israel's first and only haute couture house, preserving traditional crafts while dressing the world's most influential women.

Name: Maya Bash
Description: A minimalist, gender-neutral practice where precise tailoring meets conceptual innovation, designed in close dialogue with cultural and artistic contexts and rooted in sustainability and socially conscious values.

Name: Maya Negri
Description: Womenswear designed in soft, considered silhouettes with a quiet, contemporary hand.

Name: Mishi
Description: A curated boutique founded in spring 2016, devoted to a hand-picked team of Israeli women designers alongside select imports. Mishi is built on three principles: a high frequency of new arrivals, precise curation, and the feeling that someone's always there for you.

Name: Mishimono
Description: Womenswear with a Japanese-inflected sensibility. Mishimono works in considered silhouettes, soft layering, and a quiet, modern hand.

Name: Miss Nori
Description: Easy, wearable pieces with a soft, feminine sensibility and considered everyday silhouettes.

Name: Mors
Description: Mor Hemed's Tel Aviv design house walks the line between art and fashion, denim art, sculptural dresses, and tailored suits made in small editions.

Name: Muslin Brothers
Description: Founded in Tel Aviv in 2011 by Tamar Levit and Yaen Levi, now based in Brussels.

Name: Myki Boutique
Description: A small boutique label - understated everyday pieces designed for soft layering and easy living.

Name: Mystified Labor
Description: A conceptual label, pieces that turn process into form, working at the edge of fashion and art.

Name: Nataly Shevilly
Description: Designer label by Nataly Shevilly - elegant, occasion-ready pieces with a feminine, considered hand.

Name: Neta Efrati
Description: Evening-wear designer with a flagship on Dizengoff Square - Neta Efrati specializes in occasion dresses, jumpsuits, and tailored suits with a precise, considered hand.

Name: NewG Lingerie
Description: Founded by Alex, NewG exists to solve the lingerie problem for larger cup sizes who want pretty, comfortable and supportive bras.

Name: Nina by Mili
Description: Soft, feminine sensibility and contemporary tailoring.

Name: Nine to Five TLV
Description: Tel Aviv eyewear born from a small dream - making stylish, quality frames accessible at every price point.

Name: Ofir Ivgi
Description: Tel Aviv-based womenswear and menswear with a graphic, expressive hand, printed dresses, embroidered caps, silk ties.

Name: Ofnat Bracha
Description: Designer Ofnat Bracha young and fun

Name: OM-ME
Description: Tel Aviv activewear and basics for the in-between moments.

Name: Omer Ash
Description: Founded in 2022 in Atlit by Omer Ash at 18, a self-taught designer who learned sewing and pattern-making at home.

Name: On'nanoko
Description: Seasonal fashion from Kibbutz Ma'agan Michael, collections like ECLIPSE and PULSE that push a refined, considered aesthetic for women and a growing menswear line.

Name: 101 Brand Jeans
Description: A denim label, everyday jeans designed for fit, comfort, and a clean, modern silhouette.

Name: Ori Tamir
Description: Self-taught silversmith Ori Tamir works in 925 silver, without molds - each piece treated as its own object with its own respect.

Name: Orly Yaron
Description: Designer Orly Yaron's eponymous label, independent womenswear with a personal, considered point of view.

Name: OT Couture
Description: Sometimes a single letter tells the whole story. OT Couture, Hebrew for 'Letter Couture', sits at the intersection of fashion, design, and typography.

Name: OZ Capsule
Description: A capsule-wardrobe philosophy - OZ Capsule builds tightly edited collections of considered essentials, made to last across seasons.

Name: Palms and Tigers
Description: A prints collection inhabiting a world of ancient ruins, Greek statues, botanical elements and exotic animals.

Name: Pasiim
Description: Textured fabrics, hand-finishes and a playful but grounded approach to print and pattern.

Name: Pattern Streetwear
Description: Streetwear rooted in bold pattern and graphic design - standout pieces for those who wear their personality on their sleeve.

Name: Petit Pois Studio
Description: A small design studio with a soft, considered aesthetic - Petit Pois makes thoughtful pieces in limited runs.

Name: Pioo Pioo
Description: Founded in 2008 by Mor Valin (Shenkar), Pioo Pioo became an overnight phenomenon in Israeli fashion.

Name: Plazmalab
Description: An artist collective making psychedelic and urban tribe clothing - handmade in-house with a true passion for art.

Name: Raven
Description: Built to flatter the female body and stay comfortable from gym to street to office.

Name: Reggie Studio

Name: Ripple Yoga Wear
Description: Yoga and movement wear designed for flow - soft, breathable fabrics in calm, considered palettes for studio and everyday.

Name: Rona Clogs
Description: Swedish wooden clogs reimagined for Israel.

Name: Roni Bar
Description: Wear Yourself - Roni Bar's Tel Aviv studio (84 Ben Zvi Rd) crafts womenswear that moves with its wearer.

Name: Rosery Jewelry
Description: Handcrafted jewelry, delicate, considered pieces designed for everyday wear.

Name: SAAG
Description: Contemporary womenswear and accessories - tops, dresses, pants, skirts, and a strong accessories offering including hats, bags, and earrings.

Name: Saisei
Description: Saisei - meaning rebirth in Japanese - label rooted in regeneration: considered fabrics, mindful production, and clothes designed to be lived in for years.

Name: Sdom TLV
Description: Streetwear by Stav Greenhouse - illustration, design and street culture woven into one visual language.

Name: Semek Studio
Description: For those who still believe in love, for those who gave up on it.

Name: 7 Generations
Description: A label thinking past the season - designs made to last seven generations, with an emphasis on natural materials, slow craft, and quiet endurance.

Name: Shahar Avnet
Description: Couture-leaning designer Shahar Avnet - known internationally for tulle, hand-painting, and dreamlike eveningwear that blurs costume, art, and fashion.

Name: Sheron Designs
Description: Sculptural, boho festival design from Sheron - pieces that move between art and apparel.

Name: Shirly Halperin
Description: Founded in 2004 on Zamnehoff Street, Tel Aviv, a small independent label grown into a unique clothing and lifestyle brand.

Name: Shuzi Jewelry
Description: Designed and handcrafted in Israel by Sharon Gendelman - fresh, unique pieces inspired by Mediterranean culture and the sea.

Name: Slimz
Description: Shapewear and second-skin essentials - Slimz designs sleek, sculpting basics built to layer invisibly under everything.

Name: Studio Noa
Description: Independent studio working in clean, considered silhouettes, quietly modern womenswear made in small batches.

Name: Studio Oh Design
Description: A design studio working at the intersection of considered womenswear and craft-led production, clean lines, quality fabrics, and a calm sensibility.

Name: Subtle Body
Description: A practice shaped to evoke unique states of mind, drawing from imagined utopian futures.

Name: Sugar & Spice TLV
Description: Tel Aviv-based label with a sweet-meets-sharp edge, Sugar & Spice TLV designs for the woman who plays with contrast.

Name: Take a Nap
Address: 96 Hashmona'im St, Tel Aviv (TLV Mall) (+5 more)
Description: Soft, minimalist loungewear and homewear in beautifully textured fabrics designed for the sacred moments of rest.

Name: Tal Maslavi
Description: Designer Tal Maslavi's jewelry house - fine, sculptural pieces designed to feel at once contemporary and heirloom.

Name: Tetra Jewelry
Description: Handmade unisex silver jewelry by Guy Schwartz - original, wild, asymmetrical pieces born from inner inspiration and observation of the environment.

Name: The Freeder
Description: Born from a dancer's borrowed basketball pants, baggy, practical, with big pockets.

Name: The Little Camel
Description: Colourful, artsy wallets, purses, and accessories with a handcrafted soul, small objects with a big personality.

Name: Toda & Co
Description: TODA - Hebrew for 'thank you' - plays the in-between. Punk and graffiti energy on one side, Biblical scenes and scripture on the other.

Name: Toppatsu
Description: Playful, graphic design with a Japanese-leaning sensibility - Toppatsu makes the kind of pieces you reach for when you want to feel a little more yourself.

Name: TRES TLV
Address: 65 Pinhas Rosen St, Tel Aviv (+1 more)
Description: Launched in 2014 by three women, friends and Shenkar fashion graduates, on the principle of women creating for women.

Name: Tula
Description: Everyday quality womenswear, relaxed silhouettes, great pants, style and comfort for all sizes

Name: 2sis
Description: Womenswear by two sisters - small-batch pieces with a clean, contemporary hand.

Name: Ugly Duckling TLV
Description: A Tel Aviv fashion house born in summer 2008, specialising in flattering women's swimwear with a retro-nostalgic spirit, plus lightweight, comfortable lingerie made and available year-round.

Name: Ulla
Description: Comfortable, practical basics - no chasing trends, no seasons.

Name: Uniform Apparel
Description: 100% natural fabrics. No synthetics, ever.

Name: Ustabelle
Description: Premium denim, cashmere blends, and timeless tailored basics, with custom-dyed fabrics that go through two rounds of quality control before reaching your wardrobe.

Name: Vague Black
Description: Founded 2016 by Anuk Yosebashvili and Yaron Shmerkin.

Name: Vered Grebelsky
Description: Slow-fashion womenswear made in Israel - functional pieces meant to live in a wardrobe for years.

Name: White Nilus
Description: Born from a deep connection to nature and raw materials - timeless jewelry in silver, gold and natural stones, made to pass from generation to generation.

Name: Yael Orgad
Description: Designer Yael Orgad's eponymous label, considered womenswear with a careful, contemporary point of view.

Name: Yodfat
Description: At the entrance to Yodfat in the Galilee, set among oak trees with breathtaking views.

Name: Yoske
Description: Designed by Dorin Cohen Nissan in memory of her grandfather Yoske.

Name: Zikger
Description: Womenswear label Zikger, considered, contemporary pieces with a calm, design-led sensibility.

Name: Zucker Studio
Description: Foundational basics for the modern urban wardrobe, timeless, seasonless, and indifferent to trends. Quality fabrics, precise cuts, an eternal palette.

Name: Larus
Description: A women's footwear label for those who rewrite the rules, named after the seagull and inspired by Jonathan Livingston Seagull, the bird that refused to stay in place.

Name: Giselle
Description: Designer Rivi's thoughtfully crafted T-shirt label, locally produced in 100% high-quality cotton, comfortable everyday essentials built to last in Israeli weather.

Name: Rams
Description: A menswear label built around clean cuts, precise pieces, and an everyday presence.

Name: Flaeshwear
Description: A return to colour, structure, and unapologetic presence, flæsh draws its visual language from birds, wild cats, and architectural lines.

Name: Gershon Bram
Description: Contemporary womenswear with modern tailoring and relaxed silhouettes, high-quality fabrics, minimalist cuts, subtle detailing.

Name: Gladis
Description: A boutique womenswear label blending classic style with vintage touches, flattering, original designs in the spirit of timeless elegance, rising above passing trends.

Name: Stella and Lori
Description: Two Tel Aviv sisters, from branding and architecture, named for their grandmothers Stella and Lori, who arrived from Europe carrying style and a deep respect for individuality.

Name: Tali Dadon
Address: Near Ayalon Mall, Ramat Gan (studio, by appointment)
Description: Recycled-fabric activewear, performance textiles imported from Italy and made from fishing nets and sea-collected plastic bottles, moisture-wicking and body-sculpting, designed around real women who train and sewn fairly in a boutique workshop in Israel.

Name: Justwo Jewelry
Description: Timeless, feminine necklaces and layered sets by stylist Shiri Greenstein, classic pieces with a vintage, grandmother's-jewelry spirit and quiet personal meaning, made to stay relevant season after season.

Name: Konki Collection
Description: A new fashion brand whose collections are much more than meets the eye, built around values and messages.

Name: Omi
Description: Founded by two wounded IDF veterans together with fellow soldiers, a label that turns personal stories of service, pain, and hope into garments.

Name: Zohara
Description: Started in 2010 with a clear vision, take the classic basic tights and turn them into a fashion statement.

Name: Seestarz
Description: An online women's fashion house by sisters Alona and Daniela Tzur, with a new drop every week. Day-to-evening collections spanning tops, dresses, swimwear, resort, denim, eveningwear, and bridal, styled for the trend-led woman.

Name: Panta Rei
Description: Quality sportswear built to move with you, leggings, sports bras, studio and running kit, plus a full swim collection.

Name: Precious Individuals
Description: Yasmin Dayan's Tel Aviv studio, handmade women's fashion, locally designed and made.

Name: Cnaan Studio
Description: A boutique jewelry brand handcrafted by Noa Cnaan, inspired by the beauty of handmade work and raw materials.

Name: Figura
Description: A footwear house founded by Eli Shukron in 1989 with nothing but belief, a single hide of leather, and a deep love for the craft inherited from his father. Shoes, boots, clogs, and sandals, made in his own factory.

Name: Skirtly
Description: Womenswear designed around that moment in front of the mirror, when a garment doesn't just go on the body but truly feels right.

Name: Sun Set
Description: Born from the idea that freedom isn't a vacation but a state of mind.

Name: Nivi Scrunchies
Description: A small brand born from Nivi's love of making and handcraft, she started sewing at 16, first as a hobby.

Name: Wine Not
Description: A label that makes everything locally, from idea to cut to final stitch.

Name: Boe Body
Description: Shapewear, underwear, and tops that you can breathe in and look great.

Name: Heartbit Culture
Description: From the beat of the rave to the rhythm of the streets, techno-driven streetwear built to last.

Name: HOP
Description: ' It's not the garment that changes a woman, but the feeling she gets from it.

Name: Tamara Gartenberg
Description: A Bezalel graduate who founded Tamara in 2005, a brand that began with vividly colourful textile-and-gemstone jewelry and accessories.

Name: Tamu
Description: Founder Tami made her first pieces for herself, out of a need for clothing that felt calm, effortless, and honest.

Name: Amare
Description: A home for timeless fashion, born from a love of meticulous design, clean lines, and uncompromising quality.

Name: Halel
Description: Born from a love for subtle, minimalist design with attention to every detail.

Name: Tami Chomsky
Description: Tel Aviv womenswear by Tami Chomsky, a Bezalel visual-communication graduate who founded the label in 2007. Design moves on two parallel tracks: one led by material and the textile itself, the other by the pattern.

Name: Salon Berlin
Description: Founded in late 2007 to offer a comfortable, social alternative in Tel Aviv dressing. Timeless street fashion for women and men, designed and made in Tel Aviv and suited to the Israeli climate.

Name: Kvish 1
Description: One road, for people who feel. A magazine living between Jerusalem and Tel Aviv, the religious and the secular, that turned its spirit into a line of graphic tees, including drawings by the artist Lilien, plus other shirts and merch.

Name: Foshu Studios
Description: A contemporary label for women and men, clean, current collections spanning swimwear, dresses, tops, jumpsuits, and tailored sets, plus a pared-back Foshu White line.

Name: Vivo
Description: Clean, minimal, and international, with quality that speaks for itself. Inspired by life in Milan (and Oliver, the founders' corgi), every piece is made in small, exclusive batches, blending effortless minimalism with bold identity.

Name: Taanug
Description: An innovative, kicking brand that grew out of a drunken night among a group of friends from Zichron Yaakov. It flies the flag of the joy of making and the perfection of pleasure, developing bold, daring, eye-catching designs.

Name: Rotma
Description: Crafted in Tel Aviv, inspired by classic European elegance. Rotma makes thoughtfully made, elevated everyday wear, every piece beginning with a single thread chosen by hand and finished with the quiet confidence of something made to last.

Name: Kimos
Description: A modern resort-wear label of handmade, limited-edition kimonos and sets in 100% organic tetra cotton, breathable, thin, and made to move. Unisex, oversized, one-size pieces designed for heat and freedom.

Name: Moma
Description: Precise pieces and timeless designs, and above all flattering cuts, classic and clean total looks of the kind that always look and feel like a million dollars. Classics with a twist, soft fabrics, new arrivals every week. How easy it is when everything's just right.

Name: Pupik
Description: Active since 2014, Pupik started from making clothes the designer wanted to wear himself. The brand merges street culture, surrealism, and philosophy, drawing from raw human emotions like fear, struggle, and mortality, without sticking to one fixed direction.

Name: Nani Lee
Description: A family business, born from years of travel through the East and a love of its color. Bold, original in-house prints and flattering cuts for every size.

Name: Campy Street
Description: A casual streetwear label and Jerusalem store, logo tees, shorts, tailored sets, denim, and swimwear with an easy, on-trend everyday attitude.

Name: Lily and Lola Studio
Description: An art studio, not a fashion store, creating one-of-a-kind wearable pieces, a single painting put on a shirt or jacket, made in just one of each so no two people wear the same.

Name: Edit
Description: A streetwear label built around the oversized fit, EDIT CLUB graphic tees, relaxed cargo, knit, and corduroy trousers, and caps, easy, current, everyday pieces.

Name: Partizano
Description: A men's fashion label and store of relaxed, on-trend essentials, tees, shorts, jeans, hoodies, tailored sets, and sneakers, with an easy streetwear sensibility.

Name: Under the Rock
Description: Precise design, years of denim expertise, and production built on some of the world's finest raw materials, all merging into the denim pieces that define UTR.

Name: Disrupted Fashion Lab
Description: A conceptual fashion label working at the edge of clothing and art.

Name: Haarchion
Description: A house of graphics and print, graphic tees, posters, totes, and goods stamped with original artwork drawn from Israeli history, geography, and archaeology, from migration routes to ancient Acre.

Name: Ben Ben Studio
Description: Timeless menswear drawing on nature - the ocean, desert-meets-Viking style with subtle ethnic touches, made in small capsule runs in a fair-wage local workshop.

Name: Mirza
Description: Men's fashion by Naor Aharon, founded 2016, one of the only men's studios in Israel that designs and produces all its own pieces in-house. Tailored suits, shirts, knitwear, and groom suiting with a modern edge, worn by hundreds of local celebrities and shown at Tel Aviv Fashion Week.

Name: Tomer Landau
Description: Where fashion meets passion and art. A labour of love: flawless designed clothing, hand-sewn piece by piece straight from the studio in only the finest materials like linen and cotton.

Name: Eclat Chic
Description: A womenswear label of considered, contemporary pieces.

Name: Northern Star
Description: Founded in 2012 by Shenkar graduate Nadav Rosenberg, known for innovative textile design that blends modern and traditional techniques, original prints, and a wide range of feminine cuts and sizes. Studio by the Jaffa flea market, flagship in north Tel Aviv's Basel.

Name: KPRA
Description: KPRA ON YOU. A young Tel Aviv streetwear label of graphic tees, jeans, and tembel hats stamped with playful Hebrew slang, your new favourite everyday wardrobe with a wink.

Name: Mia Luz
Description: Resort womenswear for those who find beauty in the details, rich textures, distinctive colours, and pieces with quiet style. Tops, dresses, trousers, jumpsuits, and a signature white resort line.

Name: Roni Arbiv
Description: Made in Israel, for women who know who they are. Collections built on basics with a twist, timeless pieces with a modern touch, released as focused drops with an obsessive eye for quality and precise tailoring.

Name: Ofer Dabush
Description: Dabush is a publishing house, design studio, and brand based in Tel Aviv.

Name: Ainker
Address: 5 Yordei HaSira St, Tel Aviv (+1 more)
Description: Fusing premium craftsmanship and bold design with urban attitude. The philosophy: ART TO GET, pieces released only once, with no repeats.

Name: Yara Design
Description: A home clothing studio turned flower-inspired concept store in Kibbutz Amir. Out of a love of flowers and a deep connection to the Galilee landscape, Yara Bavaiz built her life's work, country-boho clothing alongside quality paper goods, homeware, and local art.

Name: Noyka
Description: Swimwear designed around the real, active woman's body, the kind that changes with age and size. More than ten unique pieces in original prints, all wonderfully comfortable, in a wide size range (34A to 44DD) and at prices that stay friendly to every pocket.

Name: Berni
Description: Wear less, feel more. Athleisure for women and men in an earthy, pared-back palette, sport sets, seamless tops, and bear-motif tees built for quiet, everyday strength.

Name: Cocoral
Description: An everyday-casual label for the whole family, women, men, and kids, known for its family-style collection of matching parent-and-child outfits alongside accessories and jewelry-style pieces.

Name: Hagara
Description: A contemporary fashion house dressing women in sizes 38–54, current, trend-driven, and distinctly its own, with clean, minimalist lines, quality fabrics, and small eclectic runs that make each piece exclusive. When you look good, you feel good.

Name: Hane
Description: Not just a t-shirt. Born from a love of the sea, of making, and of freedom, Hane creates quality oversized tees in original artistic prints, released in limited editions, wear creativity, feel free.

Name: Historic
Description: A unisex activewear brand built on an obsessive eye for quality, every piece designed down to the fabric, cut, and feel on the body. Precise, classic, and made for real daily use, moving naturally between the gym and everyday without changing style.

Name: Hot Seasons
Description: No labels, just legacy. A streetwear label built on drops, graphic tees, cargos, polos, and accessories released in collections like 'Rock, Paper, Seasons' with a confident skate-and-street attitude.

Name: Hot Tuna
Description: Born from a longing for quiet moments, freedom, and sun on bare skin. A brand with an overseas soul, clean, precise, self-aware design across beachwear, swimwear, and sandals, made for people who recognise what truly matters.

Name: Naama Bezalel
Description: Take a jug of nostalgia, fold in romance, a little vintage, an intense love of colour and texture, and a passion for fashion, that cocktail is the world of Naama Bezalel. One of Israel's most recognised designers, reinterpreting trends from the 1920s to the 1970s into timeless, feminine, flattering pieces.

Name: Reverb Outfitters
Description: Everyday, everywhere. High-performance activewear built for comfort and durability, started by two childhood friends with a shared vision of what a fitness community should actually look like, more a movement than a label.

Name: Ronen Chen
Description: A cornerstone of Israeli fashion for over three decades. After a 1990 trip to Japan, Ronen Chen returned with a single minimalist line, quiet yet powerful, built on origami, geometry, and clean graphic shapes. Fluid, wearable, timeless pieces for the modern woman, across a chain of more than 20 stores.

Name: Shiruetto
Description: Silhouette in Japanese. A minimalist womenswear brand based in Caesarea, launched in 2015 by artist and curator Shira Naftali. Clean lines and monochromatic tones meet feminine cuts and original hand-made textile prints, influenced by the art world, Japanese design, and street fashion, designed and made locally in small editions.

Name: Tovale+
Description: For more than three decades, Tovale+ has embodied the artistic spirit of Israel through high-end fashion by a mother-daughter team. Each piece is meticulously handcrafted in their Tel Aviv studio, wearable art that tells a story, and truly one of a kind.

Name: Razili
Description: A curated fashion house and chain founded in 1990, gathering the most coveted designer pieces under one roof, online and across mall boutiques nationwide, alongside its own clean, classic house label, Razili Studio.

Name: Lahover
Description: Adi & Shay Lahover, Tel Aviv jewelers with over 40 years of experience, handcraft one-of-a-kind, personal pieces that mirror the processes of nature, drawing on artisanal heritage and the organic flow of natural materials.

Name: AKA Rock
Description: Hand-embroidered wearable art by Avigail Kolker (AKA Rock), intricate thread drawings stitched one stitch at a time onto tees and vintage garments, where punk spirit meets needle and thread.

Name: Mother of All
Description: A womenswear label launched in 2018 by Noa Pasternak and Golan Taub, inspired by Eve, feminine, strong, and bold. Daring expression meets refined femininity, bold colour and 1980s nostalgia balanced by classic tailoring and clean, elegant silhouettes.

Name: Sabina Musayev
Description: High-quality, beautifully cut pieces made to be worn forever. Sabina Musayev's collections balance sophisticated, casual, and comfortable styles with glamorous evening looks for holidays and special events.

Name: Vanzen
Description: Where style meets serenity. 'VAN' for the sophisticated, innovative spirit of Holland; 'ZEN' for the calm and effortless harmony of Eastern philosophy. A fusion of modern European design with a timeless, restful feel, clothing made to bring both style and inner peace to everyday life.

Name: Two Tone
Description: Founded in 2014 by Zohar Kalev and Shimon Azkiel, womenswear on a mission, so a woman chooses a piece for her taste, never because it doesn't come in her size. Day-to-night, classic-meets-timeless cuts for every body, produced with real environmental responsibility.

Name: Noritamy
Description: Fashion jewelry handmade in the studio, so no two pieces are exactly alike. Every piece is dipped in a heavy layer of 24K gold or silver tone and is nickel-free, with premium lines and custom-made pieces on request.

Name: AP by Amit Philip
Description: Established in 2020 by Amit Philip, a blue-and-white local production designed and made by Amit, building the ultimate everyday wardrobe in a heartbeat, basics with a twist and a unique touch, the pieces everyone needs.

Name: Danit Peleg
Description: A pioneer in 3D-printed fashion, the first designer in the world to create an entire collection on desktop home printers. Coveted, globally exhibited pieces, including a dress for the Rio Paralympics opening ceremony, and a mission to make 3D-printed fashion accessible while cutting waste and pollution.

Name: Masada Jeans
Description: Designer Laurent David Vannucci travels the Earth and the seven seas for rare vintage denim, selected for exceptional quality and history, then redesigned, modernised, and re-cut by hand in the Tel Aviv workshop for optimal style and comfort from the first fitting.

Name: Idol Studios
Description: Israeli luxury streetwear inspired by Jewish heritage, history, and cultural symbols. Limited-edition collections that carry deep meaning and cultural narrative, redefining Jewish pride for those who wear their identity with sophistication and prestige.

Name: Yifat Finkelstein
Description: A menswear label rooted in ease, structure, and quiet precision. Soft tailoring, natural fabrics, and silhouettes that move with the body, living between streetwear and subtle elegance, shaped by the heat and friction between Tel Aviv and Jerusalem.

Name: Latto Velara
Description: An illustrated wearable-art world by artist Ori Zlotnik, bold all-over prints across clothing, shoes, bags, and home, spanning playful, punky, and darkly whimsical themed collections from Black Cat Syndrome to Rock and Horror.

Name: The Fluff
Description: Soft, comfortable, desirable lingerie and tops for the queens of everyday life, designed and made by an all-women team. Built on the belief that every woman has her own 'Fluff', pieces that feel mysterious yet completely everyday, close to the skin.

Name: BIV Street
Description: A family business born from years of art, design, and the footwear industry. BIV makes all-day-comfort sandals, water-friendly, memory-foam, easy-clean, alongside its own logo socks. Things they like, wear, and stand behind.

Name: Hoko
Description: Womenswear by Hagit Hazan, founded in 2010 after she graduated from Bezalel Academy of Arts and Design. Nonchalant on one hand and feminine on the other, complimentary and sophisticated, designed and made from a Tel Aviv studio.

Name: Lokita
Description: Womenswear with a 'blue-and-white' soul by designer Moran Avraham. Precise oversized cuts in quality fabrics, finished with original prints, embroidery, and special details, full of style and quietly cool.

Name: Not For Sale
Description: NFS, a Tel Aviv streetwear institution, both a store stocking global street and sneaker brands and its own house label of graphic hoodies and tees with a raw, local street attitude.

Name: Foof
Description: Handmade swimwear and beachwear founded by Ofir Baram Manor, built so every woman finds her perfect fit. Alongside the house collections, a custom-design service lets you choose the cut, color, and size, with comfort and uncompromising quality at the core.

Name: Mundo
Description: Born from a journey across the globe and inspired by secluded beaches and nature's wildest colors. Designer swimwear and beachwear for women and men, every print designed in-house and produced in strictly limited quantities, because you weren't born to look like everyone else.

Name: Hush Studio
Description: A handmade jewelry studio of earrings, necklaces, bracelets, and rings, spanning a wabi-sabi line that embraces the beautifully imperfect and a curated vintage and rare collection.

Name: Keren Mualem
Description: A vibrant, art-driven label of boldly printed clothing, shoes, bags, and statement headbands, playful, colorful, and unmistakably its own. Self-pickup from Givatayim.

Name: Akal
Description: By designer Michal Mangisto. A timeless collection where each garment tells a story of longing, exile, and roots, anchored in traditional Ethiopian embroidery. Built on fair employment, integrating talented women from the Ethiopian community who hand-embroider each piece.

Name: Addict
Description: A trend-driven online fashion label for women, tops, tailored suits, dresses, jumpsuits, shoes, and accessories, the most must-have pieces refreshed constantly, with a kids line, Little Addict, alongside.
